description: Reference lifecycle hook definitions for ESCC memory persistence (spec §6.2 + A.2). The production hook graph is hooks/hooks.json.

events.purpose: Hydrate the active deal's account memory plus open loops, due follow-ups, and high-confidence instincts; priority-budgeted and capped by ESCC_SESSION_START_MAX_CHARS.
Persist task intent, active account/deal, un-applied findings, and pending actions to a resumable scratch file before compaction.
Record tool intent for continuous-learning signals (untrusted tool output tagged).
Record tool results for continuous-learning signals.
Record per-session tool calls, accounts touched, and file activity.
Persist a session-end summary AND append tagged events to the active account/deal memory file.
